summary: Single Team subscriber Peacock archive unsubscribed team - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a Single Team subscriber
AND an archive Peacock game does not contain the subscribed team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive Peacock game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the Peacock feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the Peacock feed
AND the user is taken to the Subscriptions page after select the feed button with a lock icon
